# The Future of Short Range Reconnaissance
Teal Drones leads the way in sUAS innovation, providing cutting-edge solutions to the U.S. military and its allies. Manufactured in Salt Lake City, UT, Teal’s defense and security-focused systems are designed for success in modern operational environments, offering open, modular, and interoperable solutions.

Manufactured in Salt Lake City, UT, Teal’s defense and security-focused systems are designed for success in modern operational environments, offering open, modular, and interoperable solutions.
# The Future of Short Range Reconnaissance
Teal Drones leads the way in sUAS innovation, providing cutting-edge solutions to the U.S. military and its allies. Manufactured in Salt Lake City, UT, Teal’s defense and security-focused systems are designed for success in modern operational environments, offering open, modular, and interoperable solutions.
### Red Cat Announces Production Selection for U.S. Army Short Range Reconnaissance Program
Red Cat’s next generation Teal system will be the Army’s Program of Record SRR sUAS, concluding the rigorous, multi-tranche competitive process
## Built for Intelligence, Surveillance, & Reconnaissance
American-made sUAS developed under strict design guidelines that have earned Blue UAS Certification by the U.S. Department of Defense. 
Designed to be operated in the most challenging of environments for maximum mission effectiveness. 
Teal systems include AES-256 encrypted video transmission and command and control for highly secure operations. 
Teal solutions are a combination of powerful hardware and software designed, developed, and produced in the USA. 
Vertically integrated and fully modular, payload, propulsion, and battery systems can be quickly repaired, replaced, and upgraded. 
Utilizing the Tomahawk Robotics Kinesis command and control user interface enables an intutive operational experience from launch to landing. 
## Built for Intelligence, Surveillance, & Reconnaissance
American-made sUAS developed under strict design guidelines that have earned Blue UAS Certification by the U.S. Department of Defense. 
Designed to be operated in the most challenging of environments for maximum mission effectiveness. 
Teal systems include AES-256 encrypted video transmission and command and control for highly secure operations. . 
Teal solutions are a combination of powerful hardware and software designed, developed, and produced in the USA. 
Vertically integrated and fully modular, payload, propulsion, and battery systems can be quickly repaired, replaced, and upgraded. 
Utilizing the Tomahawk Robotics Kinesis command and control user interface enables an intutive operational experience from launch to landing. 
Teal’s defense and security drones offer a low-cost, portable solution designed for rapid deployment in any terrain. Built for field repairability and recoverability, they ensure mission continuity and minimal downtime. Equipped for Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR) missions, they provide real-time data and enhanced operational awareness.
Teal controllers are specifically designed for seamless integration with Teal aircraft, ensuring an exceptional user experience when immediate and accurate visual intelligence is critical. To maximize operational efficiency, the controller’s batteries are swappable with the aircraft, providing continuous power and minimizing downtime in the field. 
We know we are not the best at everything. To accelerate product development, our approach is to partner with other leading companies to bring new capabilities to our technology stack and provide our customers with a solid ecosystem of hardware and software. 
When protecting human lives and property is the number one priority, Teal aircraft are ready to put in the work needed to ensure your operations are a success. Immediate deployment and easy operation are critical.
As new threats emerge, Teal is at the cutting edge of defense. With Teal solutions, your team has the intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance needed to make critical decisions, quickly. 
Aerial imagery and payload advancements have changed the face of infrastructure inspections across all industries. Teal aircraft are equipped to handle your most complex and demanding needs. 
“As a market leader in military-grade drones, and especially night-specific drones, we look forward to providing our solutions to the government personnel who are responsible for protecting the American people and safeguarding our borders.”
## Red Cat Introduces Hellcat™, a Global Small UAS Configuration Built on the Proven Black Widow™ Platform
introduced Hellcat™, a dual-use small unmanned aircraft system (sUAS) built on the proven Black Widow™ platform and designed for rapidly evolving operational environments. Built on the proven Black Widow platform, Hellcat incorporates extensive feedback gathered directly from warfighters in the field and lessons learned through an ongoing partnership with Ukraine.
## Red Cat Successfully Completes Flight Testing of Palantir’s VNav Software on Black Widow™ Drone
announced the successful flight testing of its Black Widow™ drone equipped with Palantir Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: PLTR) Visual Navigation (VNav) Software. The test demonstrated that the Black Widow™ drone, currently part of the U.S. Army’s Short Range Reconnaissance (SRR) program of record, can navigate in GPS-denied conditions using Palantir’s visual-based navigation software. 
## Red Cat Secures FAA Authorization to Fly Drones Without Remote ID for Aeronautical Research
announced it has received authorization from the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) to operate unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) in U.S. airspace without broadcasting Remote Identification (Remote ID) information, specifically for the purpose of aeronautical research.
## Red Cat Partners with Palantir to Equip Black Widow™ with Autonomous Visual Navigation and Warp Speed for GPS-Compromised Environments
announced a strategic partnership with (Nasdaq: PLTR) to integrate Visual Navigation software (VNav) into Red Cat’s Black Widow drones and to deploy Warp Speed, Palantir’s manufacturing OS. This collaboration will transform autonomous sUAS operations for modern warfare by utilizing Palantir’s advanced AI software . . .
## DEFINING THE FUTURE OF ALL DOMAIN OPERATIONS
Red Cat is an end-to-end drone solutions company based in the United States that is accelerating the future of aerial robotics to transform the way we live and work. We have a disciplined acquisition strategy that targets companies with advanced product offerings and specialized drone operational platforms and intellectual property to provide comprehensive solutions for our customers and value for our shareholders.
Our small unmanned aircraft system (sUAS) technology is grounded in real-world impact providing critical actionable intelligence and enabling operator safety for the defense, security, industrial, and space markets.
